name: PreClick Security Scanner
description: Assess target URLs for potential threats and alignment with the user's browsing intent before agent navigation. Free to use (up to 100 requests/day, no sign-up). Connects to the hosted PreClick endpoint over Streamable HTTP. Includes companion skill.

apiKey.description: PreClick API key. Stored as sensitive plugin config and forwarded to the hosted PreClick endpoint as the X-API-Key auth header when present. Optional for hosted trial (up to 100 requests/day). For higher limits, obtain a key at contact@cybrlab.ai.
